text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat Apr 26 18:14:08 2014
New Revision: 352332
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352332
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352332/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/188612
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-HtmlTidy/Makefile

Modified: head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-HtmlTidy/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-HtmlTidy/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:14:03 2014	(r352331)
+++ head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-HtmlTidy/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:14:08 2014	(r352332)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Add HTML::Tidy support to CGI::Application
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-CGI-Application>4.01:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-Application \
 		p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-DevPopup>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-DevPopup \
 		p5-HTML-Tidy>=1.08:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-HTML-Tidy
